languages.text: Enemies that attack an ally under the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} are dealt {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} Shock damage.

traits.locale_text: Enemies that attack an ally under the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} are dealt {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} Shock damage.

languages.text: Whenever an enemy attacks an ally affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g}, that enemy suffers {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} shock damage.
languages.original_text: Enemies that attack an ally under the effect of {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g} are dealt {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} Shock damage.

traits.locale_text:
Attacks made with las weapons against allies affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}galvanic field{/g} deal +{uip|DamageBonus|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd}% more damage, have +{uip|ArmorPenetration|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd}% armour penetration, and always ricochet.
Attacks made with solid projectile weapons against allies affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}galvanic field{/g} deal shock damage instead and always ricochet.
Whenever an enemy attacks an ally affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g}, that enemy suffers {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} shock damage.
Whenever an enemy attacks an ally affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g}, that enemy suffers {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} shock damage.

Attacks made with las weapons against allies affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}galvanic field{/g} deal +{uip|DamageBonus|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd}% more damage, have +{uip|ArmorPenetration|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, and always ricochet.
Attacks made with solid projectile weapons against allies affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}galvanic field{/g} deal {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} instead and always ricochet.

languages.text: Атаковав союзника, находящегося под эффектом {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}гальваническое поле{/g}, противник получает {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} электрического урона.
languages.original_text: Whenever an enemy attacks an ally affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g}, that enemy suffers {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} shock damage.

traits.locale_text: Атаковав союзника, находящегося под эффектом {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}гальваническое поле{/g}, противник получает {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} электрического урона.

Атаковав союзника, находящегося под эффектом {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}гальваническое поле{/g}, противник получает {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} электрического урона.

languages.text: Cada vez que un enemigo ataca a un aliado afectado por {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Campo galvánico{/g}, el enemigo sufre {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} de daño de conmoción.
languages.original_text: Whenever an enemy attacks an ally affected by {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanic Field{/g}, that enemy suffers {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} shock damage.

traits.locale_text: Cada vez que un enemigo ataca a un aliado afectado por {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Campo galvánico{/g}, el enemigo sufre {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} de daño de conmoción.

languages.text: Greift ein Gegner einen Verbündeten unter dem Einfluss von {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanisches Feld{/g} an, erleidet dieser Gegner {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} Schockschaden.

languages.text: Si un ennemi attaque un allié affecté par {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Champ galvanique{/g}, cet ennemi subit {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} points de dégâts d'électrocution.

languages.text: Bir düşman, {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanik Alan{/g} etkisindeki bir dost birime saldırdığında {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} şok hasarına maruz kalır.

traits.locale_text: Bir düşman, {g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}Galvanik Alan{/g} etkisindeki bir dost birime saldırdığında {uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd} şok hasarına maruz kalır.

languages.text: 每当敌人攻击受到{g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}电激力场{/g}影响的盟友时，该敌人受到{uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd}点电击伤害。

traits.locale_text: 每当敌人攻击受到{g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}电激力场{/g}影响的盟友时，该敌人受到{uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd}点电击伤害。

languages.text: 敵が{g|f:e6926d919c6d4246b1feb2ff8d7611fc}ガルヴァニック・フィールド{/g}の影響を受けている味方を攻撃するたびに、その敵は{uip|DamageAmount|930ce7e4b50d489d825b3dd69329c3bd}のショックダメージを受ける。
